sections_cited: Section 106 of the Sindh Local Government Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 183 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.843/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case. 13.08.2025 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Shahryar Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< When confronted as to the maintainability of this petition, Counsel for the petitioner could not satisfy the Court; however submits that petitioner has been working with the department and has been paying regular salary. As far as the previous claim in terms of the prayer is concerned, he was deprived and though it was mandatory for the respondents to pay all the salaries to him in terms of Section 106 of the Sindh Local Government Act, 2013. Learned Assistant AG submits that petitioner had not produced the documentary evidence, which show that he had made any claim or approached to the concerned department seeking relief being sought for, hence, the best course for him has to file a proper Suit / Application before the Court having jurisdiction, as this Court being barred under Article 212 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973 is not competent to record evidence in the controversial issues. Accordingly, the instant Petition, in view of the above, being not maintainable is dismissed with no order as to costs. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
